mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sky_take_out.order_remark_tag ( order_id, flavor_tags, delivery_tags, urgency_level, original_remark, parse_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{flavorTags}, #{deliveryTags}, #{urgencyLevel}, #{originalRemark}, #{parseStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sky_take_out.order_remark_tag SET flavor_tags = #{flavorTags}, delivery_tags = #{deliveryTags}, urgency_level = #{urgencyLevel}, parse_status = #{parseStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
